ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graphs" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the graph file */,
  "nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the graph */,
  "total_nodes" INTEGER /* Total number of nodes in the graph */,
  "butterflies" INTEGER /* Number of butterflies in the graph */,
  "x_vars" INTEGER /* Number of X variables */,
  "c_vars" INTEGER /* Number of C variables */,
  "total_vars" INTEGER /* Total variables represented in the graph */,
  "total_constraints" INTEGER /* Total constraints applied to the graph */,
  "crossings" INTEGER /* Number of crossings in the graph */,
  "graph_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the graph */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the graph */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the graph is public or private */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the graph file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphs_graph_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_type_id") REFERENCES graph_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the result is associated with */,
  "opttime" REAL /* Time taken for optimization (in seconds) */,
  "work" REAL /* Total work done during optimization */,
  "nodes_visited" INTEGER /* Total nodes visited during the optimization process */,
  "setup_time" REAL /* Time taken to set up the optimization (in seconds) */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used for optimization */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the result file */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization result */,
  "is_downloaded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result has been downloaded */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the result has been downloaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES optimization_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the graph */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the graph was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions granted to this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the graph type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the graph type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the graph type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the algorithm optimizes graphs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_queue" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the job */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph associated with the job */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used for the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time when the job was submitted */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the job */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated completion time of the job */,
  "actual_completion_time" TEXT /* Actual completion time of the job */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization result (if any) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_queue_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES optimization_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_queue_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_queue_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_queue_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES optimization_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
